task: Consult before concluding that Kubernetes' Container Runtime Interface is one of the three most important architectural decisions. Request related architectural motifs, historical lineage, prior decision traces, contradiction candidates, and recurring themes. Test whether CRI is merely an implementation detail or a system-defining boundary extraction from kubelet.

context.summary: Candidate decision: introduce CRI so kubelet can use multiple runtimes without recompilation and later remove built-in dockershim. Public evidence includes the 2016 CRI introduction blog, KEP-2221 removing dockershim, and the 2022 dockershim FAQ.
constraints: Public historical claims must come from public Kubernetes sources
Do not expose hidden chain-of-thought, Inside Voice internals, Belief Ledger internals, or private substrate state
desired_artifacts: confidence boundary for final architecture truth map
